q: How to measure 'Managerial Bloat' in a 100-person startup
diagnostic: Managerial bloat is the ratio of coordination labor to value-creating labor. When every decision requires a meeting, your managers have become overhead. The Digital Vanguard agent would measure this as the entropy of your communication graph.
answer: Managerial bloat is the ratio of coordination labor to value-creating labor. When every decision requires a meeting, your managers have become overhead. The Digital Vanguard agent would measure this as the entropy of your communication graph.
description: R&D stagnation — the 'Maintenance Tax' eats the Innovation Budget. Engineers spend 80% on refactoring the refactor.
symptom: R&D budget grows, feature release cycle slows. $20M Series B spent on keeping the lights on.
